heading: Refund of tax on wine

children.text: any tax imposed by section 5041 shall, if paid, be refunded or credited, without interest, to the proprietor of the bonded wine cellar to which such wine is delivered; or
if any tax so imposed has not been paid, the person liable for the tax may be relieved of liability therefor,

children.heading: Date of filing
children.label: b Date of filing
children.text: No claim under subsection (a) shall be allowed unless filed within 6 months after the date of the return of the wine to bond.

children.heading: Status of wine returned to bond
children.label: c Status of wine returned to bond
children.text: All provisions of this chapter applicable to wine in bond on the premises of a bonded wine cellar and to removals thereof shall be applicable to wine returned to bond under the provisions of this section.
